meta.homeTitle: Bansos Developer & AI - Social Assistance for Indie Programmers
meta.homeDesc: A curated collection of freebies, discounts, free AI API credits, and social assistance for developers and programmers in Indonesia. Free domains, cloud servers, AI credits, no credit card needed! fr fr 🚀

meta.aboutTitle: About bansos.dev - Open Source Developer Promo Catalog Indonesia
meta.aboutDesc: bansos.dev is an open-source developer promo catalog for finding free domains, cloud credits, API credits, hosting free-tier, and startup benefits.
meta.contribDesc: How to add developer social assistance listings to bansos.dev.

home.heroCommunity: Bansos is short for bantuan sosial, meaning social assistance: mutual aid for fellow broke developers to glow up their projects
home.heroIntro: The gathering place for info on blessings, freebies, and the most legit coding tool discounts. Made specifically for us who need a glowing portfolio but have a dying wallet.

adv.curatedDesc: Info on free domains, hosting, API, and serverless credits directly from official providers. No link shortener traps!
adv.transparentDesc: All new bansos requests, data validation, and community discussions are openly available on GitLab Issues & MRs.
adv.opensourceDesc: Source code and data are free to audit, fork, or self-host entirely on your own infrastructure.
adv.communityDesc: Data is transparently managed by the Indonesian developer community. Anyone can contribute & update.
adv.referralDesc: You're free to submit your referral link to earn commission. Just don't overwrite other people's referral links!
adv.fairDesc: Supporting personal referral links as contribution rewards, with strict rules against replacing others' links!

home.disclaimerText: bansos.dev is an open-source community platform to support fellow Indonesian developers. STRICTLY PROHIBITED from using the information here for abuse, ToS violations, privacy violations, or illegal activities. Information is for reference only — always verify with the official provider before claiming. Abuse will be dealt with firmly without warning.
home.ossDesc: Got other developer freebie info? Free domains, hosting free-tier, free API credits, or cloud giveaway programs? Don't keep it to yourself, bro! Send a Pull Request and help fellow broke developers survive.

about.introP1: `bansos.dev` is a social assistance catalog for broke developers: a place to collect free programs, vouchers, credits, discounts, and startup benefits relevant to Indonesian developers. Simple focus: help developers save budget while learning, experimenting, building portfolios, or shipping side projects.
about.introP2: The listings include free domains, hosting free-tier, cloud credits, API credits, database credits, startup programs, and other coding tool promos claimable from official provider sources.

infoCards.easyDesc: Every listing is stored as structured data with tags, active/expired status, validity period, provider, benefits, and claim steps so they're easy to find from the list page.
infoCards.transparentDesc: All new bansos addition requests, data validation, and community discussions are conducted openly on GitLab Issues & Merge Requests.
infoCards.opensourceDesc: bansos.dev source code and data are fully open-source. You can clone, review the code, even host this site yourself on your own infrastructure.
infoCards.instantDesc: Contributors can add new programs automatically via interactive form or CLI commands without needing to set up a code environment.
infoCards.curationDesc: Every entry is ensured to use official links, honest descriptions, and clear validity notes. The goal is purely to help each other save budget.
infoCards.fairDesc: Supports contributor personal referral links as a form of reward, with strict rules against replacing other people's referral links.
infoCards.noccDesc: All listed programs strive to be free without requiring a credit card number. Free from auto-debit subscription traps after the promo period ends.
infoCards.noadsDesc: This site is purely built to help developers. No blinking ad banners, spam popups, malicious trackers, or trap link shorteners.
infoCards.lightDesc: Built using super-fast SvelteKit static generation. Pages load instantly, data-efficient, and friendly for limited internet connections.
infoCards.communityDesc: Having trouble claiming or need the latest bansos info fastest? Get help and promo leaks directly in our Discord or Telegram community groups.

about.discordDesc: Want to discuss the latest bansos info, ask development questions, collaborate on side projects, or just hang out with other broke developers? Join our Discord server now!
about.communityDesc: Communities that have helped contribute, promote, or share bansos.dev info in their groups will be promoted here.
about.sponsorDesc: bansos.dev is completely free and built by the community. You can support this project through financial sponsorship or direct contributions!
about.sponsorCodeDesc: Help by starring on GitLab, submitting new bansos info, or opening PRs to add/update features:
about.disclaimerP1: bansos.dev is an open-source community platform aimed at helping fellow Indonesian developers find legitimate and legal social assistance programs from official providers. We are not affiliated with any provider.
about.disclaimerLi1: Misuse of bansos information for abuse purposes or exploiting provider policy/security loopholes.
about.disclaimerLi2: Violation of Terms of Service (ToS) of any platform or third-party provider.
about.disclaimerLi3: Actions that violate data privacy of individuals or organizations.
about.disclaimerLi4: Any form of illegal activity or violation of applicable law.
about.disclaimerLi5: Submitting false, misleading, or unclaimable bansos information.
about.disclaimerReference: All displayed information is for reference only. Always verify directly with the official provider site before claiming. We are not responsible for unilateral policy changes by providers, misinterpretation of benefits, or misuse of information by irresponsible parties.
about.disclaimerAgreement: By using bansos.dev, you agree that this platform is merely a community catalog and all claims, transactions, or interactions with providers are entirely the personal responsibility of each user.

contribute.h1: Got bansos info? Don't enjoy it alone.
contribute.intro: Choose the most comfortable contribution method for you. Currently, only Git Clone and Email submissions are available; other methods are temporarily disabled due to spam.
contribute.warningText: DO NOT submit misleading, fake, or unclaimable bansos information. STRICTLY FORBIDDEN from including steps that are abusive, illegal, or violate third-party Terms of Service (ToS). Violators will be permanently removed from bansos.dev without notice.
contribute.referralText: You are free to use your personal referral link when submitting new bansos data. However, please do NOT overwrite or replace existing referral links from other contributors. Let's respect the first contributor who shared that info!
contribute.formDisabled: Due to many spam submissions with misleading and confusing bansos information, we have disabled form submissions.
contribute.formWarning: ⚠️ DO NOT submit fake, misleading, abusive, illegal, or ToS-violating bansos information. Violation = permanent ban.
contribute.npxDisabled: Due to many spam submissions with misleading and confusing bansos information, we have disabled npx submissions.
contribute.npxWarning: ⚠️ DO NOT submit fake, misleading, abusive, illegal, or ToS-violating bansos information. Violation = permanent ban.
contribute.gitDesc: Download the repo first, then run the local script to add data. After that you can review before creating a manual PR. Suitable for those who want to see the results before submitting.
contribute.gitIntegrity: Attention: Only submit bansos that are genuinely valid and claimable. Misleading information, abuse steps, or illegal content are strictly prohibited and will be removed without notice. Rogue contributors will be permanently banned.
contribute.gitNote: After data is added to bansos.json, push your branch and open a PR to main. CI will auto-validate the data.
contribute.aiDisabled: Due to many spam submissions with misleading and confusing bansos information, we have disabled AI Agent submissions.
contribute.aiWarning: ⚠️ DO NOT submit fake, misleading, abusive, illegal, or ToS-violating bansos information. Violation = permanent ban.
contribute.emailDesc: Send bansos info directly to our email. Just click the button below, fill in the bansos details in the email body, and send!
contribute.emailIntegrity: Attention: Only submit bansos that are genuinely valid and claimable. Misleading information, abuse steps, or illegal content are strictly prohibited and will be removed without notice. Rogue contributors will be permanently banned.
contribute.emailHint: Or copy the template below, send manually to submit@bansos.dev
contribute.discordDesc: We are preparing an interactive Discord Bot to make submitting bansos easier directly through chat. Just share a promo link in a dedicated channel, and our bot will validate and process the data!
contribute.discordCardDesc: Join our Discord server first to get ready and chat with us!
contribute.telegramDesc: Besides Discord, we are also building an interactive Telegram Bot! Soon you'll be able to send promo details directly via chat bot to process bansos data automatically.
contribute.telegramCardDesc: Follow our Telegram channel so you don't miss the latest developer bansos program updates and bot release info!
contribute.toastCopyFailed: Copy failed, try selecting the text manually.
contribute.contribProjectDesc: Project contributors are GitLab accounts that actually add or change code or data through commits. One bansos can have multiple project contributors if it has been updated.
contribute.contribRegisteredDesc: Registered contributors are people who contributed to adding or updating bansos data via CLI/system.
contribute.contribRegisteredEmpty: No contributors detected in the data yet.

terms.lead: By using bansos.dev, you agree that this site is a community catalog for finding promo, credit, discount, and freebie info relevant to developers.
terms.section1Desc: The bansos list is curated from public sources or community contributions. We strive to keep data accurate, but program details such as validity period, quota, claim requirements, benefits, and links may change at any time by the program provider.
terms.section2Desc: bansos.dev is not an official representative of listed providers unless explicitly stated. All brands, product names, and logos remain the property of their respective owners.
terms.section3Desc: Before claiming a program, double-check the details on the provider's official page. The decision to register, submit data, enter payment cards, or use third-party services is entirely the user's responsibility.
terms.section4P1: Contributions must include correct information, official sources, and must not be misleading. Contributors are strictly prohibited from sending spam, malicious links, or fake programs.
terms.section4P2: Referral Link Policy: Anyone is allowed to include their own referral link when submitting a new bansos program. However, it is strictly forbidden to overwrite or replace referral links belonging to other contributors that were already registered, to maintain sportsmanship and respect the first contributor of the program (gentleman's agreement).
terms.section5Title: 5. Prohibition: Abuse, ToS Violation & Illegal Activity
terms.section5Intro: STRICTLY PROHIBITED from using bansos information on this platform for:
terms.liAbuse: Abuse purposes or exploiting provider policy/security loopholes.
terms.liTos: Violating Terms of Service (ToS) of any platform or third-party provider.
terms.liPrivacy: Actions that violate data privacy of individuals or organizations.
terms.liIllegal: Any form of illegal activity or violation of applicable law.
terms.liFalse: Submitting false, misleading, or unclaimable bansos information.
terms.section5Outro: Violations will be dealt with firmly: contributors will be permanently banned, listings removed without notice, and if necessary, reported to the authorities.
terms.section6Desc: Maintainers may update, reject, edit, mark as expired, or delete listings if the information is invalid, no longer relevant, risks being misleading, or is not aligned with bansos.dev's purpose.
terms.section7Desc: bansos.dev is provided as-is. We do not guarantee that every program is still active, available to all users, or provides benefits as expected. Losses resulting from the use of third-party services are outside bansos.dev's responsibility.

providers.subtitle: All providers are automatically pulled from the bansos list. When a new bansos is added, this page updates without manual maintenance.

detail.bottomDesc: A curated catalog of free developer promos and discounts. Managed 100% transparently by the community on GitLab. Help fellow broke developers survive by contributing!
